prompt: For a computational protein engineering project, design variants of PIK3CA (Kinase) from Homo sapiens with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. provide a computational approach covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using AlphaFold2, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Describe the key steps and decision points in the workflow.
